property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops an energy attack. At the end of combat, if you have performed a physical attack and an energy attack this combat, raise your anger 2 levels.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage or stops a physical attack. Change the Future.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (You may only include this card in your deck if there are no cards in your deck that discard cards from your opponent's hand.) Physical attack doing 4 life cards of damage or stops an energy attack. For the remainder of combat, your other cards that can both perform an attack and stop an attack stay on the table to be used an additional time this combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: At the beginning of your Power-Up Step, your allies gain X power stages, where X= your MP's PUR. When entering combat choose an ally you have in play. The chosen ally may take control of combat regardless of your MP's stages above 0 for the remainder of combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Transform. Energy attack. Lower your opponent's anger 1 level. If you have stopped an attack using your Mastery this combat, search your Life Deck for a Drill and place it into play. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Focused energy attack. Change the Future. You may reveal the top card of your Life Deck, then if it is an ally, place it into play at 3 power stages above 0, and for the remainder of combat, that ally make take control of combat regardless of your MP's power stages above 0.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance 1. Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. Empower 2. Search your Life Deck for a Namekian style drill and place it into play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Whenever this card is placed back into your Life Deck from your discard pile, raise your anger 1 level.) Energy attack doing 6 life cards of damage. If your declared a tokui-waza and you've put 1 or more cards back into your Life Deck this turn, raise your anger 2 levels.

property.name: Text
property.value: Once per combat, Change the Future. You may use the once per combat effect of your Mastery to play the top card of your Life Deck an additional time each combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck Only. Endurance 2. Focused physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. If successful, lower your opponent's Main Personality 2 personality levels. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. You may raise your anger 1 level. Change the Future. You may discard the top card of your Life Deck. For the remainder of combat, your attacks do +X power stages of damage where X= the Endurance of any styled card discarded this way.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance 4. Physical attack doing +5 power stages of damage. Raise your anger 1 level. If stopped, place this card on the top of your Life Deck after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages or 4 life cards of damage. If you declared a tokui-waza, you may give up winning by MPPV for the remainder of the game to raise your anger 3 levels.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 6 life cards of damage. For the remainder of combat, whenever you advance a personality level, you do not discard your drills. If you control 3 or more red styled drills, raise your anger 2 levels.

property.name: Text
property.value: Once per combat, during your Attacker Attacks phase, you may perform a physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage, or Change the Future.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +5 power stages of damage. You may set your anger to 0 to lower your opponent's anger 2 levels. If you have prevented damage this combat with a non-endurance effect, then for the remainder of combat, your Styled attacks are focused and do +2 life cards of damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops an energy attack. Raise your anger 1 level. Choose up to 1 non-personality card in play. Your opponent cannot use the chosen card for the remainder of combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. Change the Future. If successful, reveal the top card of your Life Deck. For the remainder of combat, during your opponent's Attacker Attacks phase, their cards of the same type as the revealed card cost +2 power stages of damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Focused energy attack doing 6 life cards of damage. You may reduce the damage this attack deals by any amount of life cards (to a minimum of 0) to shuffle that many Trunks or Vegeta named cards in your discard pile into your Life Deck. If this attack's damage was reduced to 0 this way, your opponent skips their next Attacker Attacks phase this combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 7 life cards of damage. If successful, and used by a Fused Personality, you may return it to your Sensei Deck to choose a Fused Personality with the same name that is 1 level higher from your Sensei Deck and place it into play at its highest power stage. Remove from game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: (If you place this card into play during combat, you may raise your MP to its highest power stage.) When you perform an attack, you may choose to have it do +2 power stages of damage, and gain "If successful, gain 3 power stages." If Gohan is your MP, this card is not discarded when you advance a personality level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (If this card is in your discard pile, and you declared a Freestyle Tokui-waza, you may remove it from the game during your Attacker Attacks phase to raise your anger 1 level.) Energy attack. If you declared a Freestyle Tokui-Waza, raise your anger 2 levels. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Search your Life Deck or discard pile for an ally and place it into play at 3 power stages above 0. Then, if you have an ally in play that can fuse with your MP (they do not have to be the same personality level), they may fuse into a Fusion Personality that is the same level as your MP. At the end of your opponent's next turn, or whenever they would defuse (whichever happens first), they defuse.

property.name: Text
property.value: (If this card is discarded from your hand, and your opponent ended combat this turn, advance a personality level.) Raise your anger 1 level. For the remainder of combat, your opponent cannot end combat and during your Attacker Attacks phases you may discard a card to raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (When one of your effects would require you to remove cards in your discard pile from the game, this card counts as 1 or 2 cards, regardless of requirement.) Energy attack. For the remainder of combat, you are considered to have no cards in your hand for your non-Dragon Ball card effects.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Villains only. Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. You may discard an attached card in play. You may raise your anger.

property.name: Text
property.value: (You may only include this card in your deck if your deck is at maximum deck size. If it is the first combat of the game, this card may be used as a "use when needed" effect.) Raise your main personality to its highest power stage. For the remainder of combat, your opponent must deal 2 additional life cards of damage to capture a Dragon Ball. For the remainder of the game, your Dragon Balls cannot be removed from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: Resist. Zamasu only. Your Drills are not discarded when advancing or lowering personality levels via your card effects or by anger gained via your card effects. When your opponent uses a card effect to remove cards from your discard pile, among them they may only remove 1 Drill.

property.name: Text
property.value: (You cannot name or affect a Main Personality card, Dragon Ball, Sensei, or Mastery with this card.) Remove a card in play from the game. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: (If your MP is Goku Black or Zamasu, before the first turn of the game begins, you may search your Life Deck for a copy of this card and place it into play attached to your MP.) Attach this card to your MP. While attached, ignore any "___ only" effects on copied attacks you perform, and any styled words are considered to match your tokui-waza.

property.name: Text
property.value: Cards in your Sensei Deck cannot be removed from the game. When you defuse, return the Fusion Personality to your Sensei Deck. Once per game, during your Non-Combat step, you may choose to have your opponent play with their hand revealed until the end of this turn.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: (When you Change the Future, if this card is among them, you may place it into play at 3 power stages above 0.) Power: Energy attack. Reveal the bottom cardof your Life Deck. If it can perform an attack, you may remove it from the game to perform that attack instead.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: Power: Physical attack doing +3 power stages and +3 life cards of damage. Your other personality power is focused and does +1 life card of damage for each Vegeta and Goku named card in your discard pile. Power: Energy attack doing 7 life cards of damage. Your other personality power is focused, its base damage is doubled, and gains "gain 5 power stages."

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: (If this card is in your MP stack, when you Change the Future, you may place the cards on the or bottom of your Life Deck instead.) Power: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage, or energy attack. If you have no cards in your hand, raise your anger 2 levels, then Change the Future.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: At the end of combat, raise your anger 1 level. If you have no cards in your hand, Change the Future. Power: Energy attack. Reveal the bottom card of your Life Deck, if it is an energy combat card, raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: Power: Energy attack doing 7 life cards of damage. Reveal the bottom card of your Life Deck. If it is an energy combat card, this attack gains its secondary and if successful effects. At the end of combat, Change the Future.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: When entering combat, Change the Future. Power: Energy attack doing +1 life card of damage for each energy combat card in your discard pile.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: At the end of combat, if your opponent performed no attacks, raise your anger 3 levels. Power: If your opponent performed a successful attack in their last Attacker Attacks phase this combat, perform the same attack as long as you have the stages to pay for it.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Power: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. You may raise your anger 1 level. For the remainder of combat, once per combat, you may discard a named card matching your MP to use this personality power an additional time.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: (You may discard a Zamasu ally you control to advance a personality level and set your anger level to 0.) Power: Stops a physical or energy attack. In your next Attacker Attacks phase, perform the exact same attack that this card stopped, if you have the power stages to for it, and you cannot add cards to your hand with that attack.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: (If this card is in your MP stack, your Defense Shield Drills gain Resist, and can stop focused attacks.) Power: Search your Life Deck for a freestyle Drill and set it aside. At the end of the turn, place it into play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Power: Search your Life Deck or discard pile for a Drill and set it aside. At the end of the turn, place it into play. Until the end of the turn, when 1 or more Drills enter play, you may raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: (You may discard a Goku Black ally you control to advance a personality level and set your anger level to 0.) Power: Choose a Drill you control. For the remainder of combat, you are considered to have another copy of that Drill in play. Search your Life Deck or discard pile for a Drill and place it into play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: (This card's name is also considered to be "Fused Goku Black.") Power: Use your level 2 personality power. Power: Discard a card. Search your opponent's discard pile for a card that perform an attack, remove it from the game, and then perform a copy of that attack.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: (This card's name is also considered to be "Fused Goku Black, Mutated.") Constant Combat Power: While your MP's power rating is Z, your Drills cannot leave play, and otherwise damage from your attacks cannot be prevented. Power: Use one of your lower level personality powers.
